description: DRY-RUN ENFORCER: Ensures run_sql is always called with dryRun=true at least once before a real execution in the same session. Prevents first-run direct commits to the database.

preToolUse.description: Track dry-run state per session; block real SQL execution if dry-run hasn't been run yet
preToolUse.bash:
#!/bin/bash
payload=$(cat)
tool=$(echo $payload | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_name',''))")
if [ "$tool" != "run_sql" ]; then exit 0; fi
dry_run=$(echo $payload | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('dryRun','false'))")
session=$(echo $payload | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('session_id','no-session'))")
cwd=$(echo $payload | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('cwd',''))")
state_dir="$cwd/.copilot-state"
state_file="$state_dir/dryrun-$session.flag"
if [ "$dry_run" = "True" ] || [ "$dry_run" = "true" ]; then
  mkdir -p "$state_dir"
  date > "$state_file"
  exit 0
fi
if [ ! -f "$state_file" ]; then
  echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Dry-run required first. Call run_sql with dryRun=true first."}'
  exit 1
fi
exit 0

sessionEnd.description: Clean up session dry-run flag files on session end
sessionEnd.powershell:
param($input)
$payload = $input | ConvertFrom-Json
$stateDir = Join-Path $payload.cwd '.copilot-state'
$sessionId = $payload.session_id
$stateFile = Join-Path $stateDir "dryrun-$sessionId.flag"
if (Test-Path $stateFile) { Remove-Item $stateFile }
exit 0
sessionEnd.bash:
#!/bin/bash
payload=$(cat)
session=$(echo $payload | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('session_id','no-session'))")
cwd=$(echo $payload | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('cwd',''))")
rm -f "$cwd/.copilot-state/dryrun-$session.flag"
exit 0
